EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The malicious object "{reason}" is detected in the file "{object.storage.name}" on host {event_src.host}
The unwanted object is detected in the file "{object.storage.name}" on host {event_src.host}
A behavioral analysis for an executable file "{object.storage.name}" is bypassed with the result "{object.state}" on host {event_src.host}
A behavioral analysis for an executable file "{object.storage.name}" is finished with the result "{object.state}" on host {event_src.host}
